---
title: "Quarto"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  error: true
  include: true
---


## R

```{r}
#| echo: false
source("src/00_libs.R")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
data <- read_csv("data/data.csv")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
data |> 
  filter(row_number()<20) |>
  kable("html")
```


## JavaScript

{{< include src/00_config.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_libs.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_utils.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
data = FileAttachment("data/data.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
data
```


## Colors

```{ojs}
html`
<div class="logo-container-styleguide">
  ${colors_burger.map(color => html`
    <div class="swatches">
      <div 
        title="${color}" 
        style="
          margin-bottom: 1em;
          width: 24px; 
          height: 24px; 
          background-color: ${color}; 
          border: 0.75px solid black;"
      >
      </div>
      <div>${color}</div>
      <div>${hexToRgb(color)}</div>
    </div>
  `)}
</div>`
```
